features: EASILY SLIDES BETWEEN TEETH: 55 yards of unflavored and waxed coating allows floss to slide smoothly between teeth to effectively remove plaque
SHRED RESISTANT: Designed with more threads than regular floss, which allows floss to resist shredding and breaking
THOROUGHLY CLEANS: Thin Diameter Micro-Filament Floss easily gets into hard-to-reach spaces
PFAS-FREE: Contains no PFAS, ensuring the dental floss is free from harmful chemicals and toxin
DENTIST RECOMMENDED BRAND: REACH is a dentist recommended brand (IQVIA, ProVoice Survey)
description: Product Description Clean between teeth and under your gum line with Reach Unflavored Waxed Dental Floss. This unflavored floss is designed to slide easily and comfortably between teeth while it removes plaque and food particles for optimal oral hygiene when used after brushing. It is accepted by the American Dental Association (ADA) and is designed to clean between teeth and under the gum line. Flossing is part of a dentist-recommended oral care routine that is designed to remove plaque and help reduce tooth decay. Ingredients Wax Directions Standard instructions for use for dental floss Safety Warning No special precautions known. See more
